title: Challenge Plugin
body:
# Challenge Plugin
This is a Plugin that adds multiple Challenges with lots of settings and a user friendly GUI to the game.

## Features
- Random Mob Challenge
- Random Effect Challenge
- Random Block Drop Challenge
- Random Item Collect Challenge
- Lava Challenge
- Health Challenge
- Setting UI (`/settings or /settings <CHALLENGE> <OPTION> <VALUE>`)
- Timer (`/timer [resume, pause, reset, set]`)
- highly customizable configuration


## Todo

- Migrate from Maven to Gradle
